reason: This finding addresses a standard STIG hardening measure for PAM password policy configuration. The remediation involves a straightforward edit to /etc/security/pwquality.conf, which is unlikely to cause lockout or critical service breakage when following the recommended retry value. It falls under auth/pam changes explicitly marked as safe_to_remediate in the policy.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Potential user lockout if retry value is set excessively low; Minor service interruption if PAM-dependent services require restart
